title: anthyllis vulneraria var. hosmarensis
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria var. hosmarensis, also known as kidney vetch, is a subspecies of a flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of kidney vetch include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Kidney vetch is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and can be found in some herbal supplements and remedies, although its availability and efficacy may vary.
